description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: build-ubuntu and build-windows. The build-ubuntu job runs on an ubuntu-18.04 environment, installs dependencies, checks out the repository, and builds the project using CMake and make. The build-windows job runs on a windows-latest environment, installs dependencies and Qt, checks out the repository, configures CMake, and builds the project.
